collections.title: Shower Faucet Control Handle Only
collections.body_html: Shower Faucets often include a showerhead (and sometimes a tub spout too) but if you already have these fixtures, then you should purchase a shower faucet control handle only. These functioning shower valve trim controls work with any showerhead or tub spout. With a shower control like this, it would be possible to send the water to a ceiling showerhead instead of a normal wall mount showerhead. For additional information on shower faucet controls, including information about required rough-in valves, take a look at our article on Delta Shower Faucets. Create the shower of your dreams using a shower faucet control valve. Shop now!

collections.title: Shower Faucets
collections.body_html:
A good Shower Faucet really helps you start your day off right. High-quality shower faucets and shower heads make you feel refreshed and invigorated. Whether you need a shower only faucet, a tub and shower combo, or a complete shower system we have a wide range of finishes and styles. To learn more about how shower faucets work, check out our Delta Shower Faucets buying guide.

Narrow your search by selecting one of the sub-categories below or simply keep scrolling to view all Shower Faucets.

collections.title: Thermostatic Shower Faucets
collections.body_html: In the old days Shower Faucets were not all temperature balanced. A thermostatic shower faucet guarantees that the water will stay in a desired range even if someone flushes the toilet or turns on the water in another part of the house. Thermostatic valves also offer anti-scald protection. For additional information on what exactly is different about a thermostatic shower faucet, read our article on Delta Thermostatic Shower Faucet Trim Kit Cartridges: Monitor 17 Series vs. 17T Series TempAssure. Shop our many great style of thermostatic shower fixture and order today!

collections.title: Trim Kit: Rough-in Valve NOT INCLUDED
collections.body_html: A "Trim Kit Only, This Fixture Requires a Rough-in Valve" tag indicates this item may not be installed unless you already have the required rough-in valve or purchase it separately. The valve is the part that installs in your wall our deck and connects to the hot and cold water lines in your home. A trim kit only is great for people who already have a valve and simply want to change outside part.

For additional information on shower faucet controls, including information about required rough-in valves, take a look at our article on Delta Shower Faucets. Create the shower of your dreams using a shower faucet control valve. Shop now!

collections.title: Shower Faucets
collections.body_html:
A good Shower Faucet really helps you start your day off right. High-quality shower faucets and shower heads make you feel refreshed and invigorated. Whether you need a shower only faucet, a tub and shower combo, or a complete shower system we have a wide range of finishes and styles. To learn more about how shower faucets work, check out our Delta Shower Faucets buying guide.

Narrow your search by selecting one of the sub-categories below or simply keep scrolling to view all Shower Faucets.

collections.title: All
collections.body_html: FaucetList.com is the easiest place to order a Faucet - or anything else! We have a wide range of products like Showers, Tubs, Bathroom Vanities, Ceiling Fans and more! Here in the "All" category you will find everything we carry. Get started by using the sidebar to filter your results. You can narrow by finish, type, price and more. Shop now!

collections.title: All Shower Faucets
collections.body_html:
The All Shower Faucets category contains popular styles like tub and shower combination faucets, shower only faucets, and complete shower systems. It also includes harder to find items like thermostatic shower faucets and shower faucets with hand shower. Shop modern and traditional styles and order today! We specialize in Delta brand showers so make sure to check out our Delta Shower Faucets buying guide.

Narrow your search by selecting one of the sub-categories below or simply keep scrolling to view all Shower Faucets.

collections.title: Complete Delta Shower Faucets
collections.body_html: Here you will find only Delta brand Shower Fixtures sold Complete with Trim Kit, Rough Valve, and everything necessary for installation included. Often Shower only Faucets, Shower Controls, and Tub and Shower Combos are sold in component pieces. At FaucetList.com we have taken out the guess work to make buying easy! For additional information on rough-in valves, trims, cartridges and more, take a look at our article on Delta Shower Faucets. Shop now from our great selection of complete Delta Shower Faucets and order today!

collections.title: Complete: Rough-in Valve INCLUDED
collections.body_html: A "Complete Fixture Includes Rough-in Valve" tag indicates that this item is sold complete with the trim kit and valve necessary for installation. The valve is the part that installs in your deck or wall and connects to the hot and cold water lines in your home. Some companies include the valve by default but others do not. Shop here for fixtures that are all sold complete and ready to install!

collections.title: Delta Linden Collection
collections.body_html: Delta Linden Collection Faucets and Fixtures feature stylish flares and unexpected curves.

collections.title: Delta Stainless Steel Finish Faucets and Fixtures
collections.body_html: Delta Stainless Steel finish Faucets and Fixtures offer a modern elegance and sleek design aesthetic. Featuring Bathroom Faucets, Shower Faucets, Tub Fillers, Kitchen Faucets, and Bathroom Accessories, you can get practically any type of Delta product in Stainless Steel finish. For further information and inspiration, check out the many beautiful images in our Complete Guide to Stainless Steel Finish Fixtures for Your Kitchen and BathUse the side menu and try narrowing down the results below by collection. You will quickly find all the perfectly matching Delta products and can order everything you need today!

collections.title: Nickel / Stainless Steel
collections.body_html: At FaucetList.com we are huge fans of Nickel Finish Kitchen and Bathroom Faucets. Nickel finish products have a sleek stainless steel look that is smooth and pleasing to the senses. We have many traditional and modern styles of Stainless Steel finish, Satin Nickel, and Brushed Nickel Finish Kitchen and Bath Fixtures. For more information about Stainless Steel finish, and to see lots of inspiring images, read our Complete Guide to Stainless Steel Finish Fixtures for Your Kitchen and Bath. Check out our great deals on the best Nickel and Stainless Steel finish Bathroom and Kitchen Fixtures Now!

collections.title: Shower Faucet Control Handle Only
collections.body_html: Shower Faucets often include a showerhead (and sometimes a tub spout too) but if you already have these fixtures, then you should purchase a shower faucet control handle only. These functioning shower valve trim controls work with any showerhead or tub spout. With a shower control like this, it would be possible to send the water to a ceiling showerhead instead of a normal wall mount showerhead. For additional information on shower faucet controls, including information about required rough-in valves, take a look at our article on Delta Shower Faucets. Create the shower of your dreams using a shower faucet control valve. Shop now!
